items.title: There’s a lot of hype around perimenopause. Don’t buy it.
items.summary: Perimenopause has entered the chat. Perimenopause—and its better-known relative, menopause—used to be considered taboo. Not anymore, thanks at least in part to TV doctors and social media influencers.
